statement: In every magma, Equation 2738 (`x = ((y * y) * (x * y)) * z`) implies Equation 159 (`x = (x * y) * (y * x)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0352
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op (op y y) (op x y)) z)) :
    ∀ x y z : G, x = (op (op x y) (op y x))
